---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Octo-POA
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## How would this benefit Octo-POA?

Explain how this feature would:
- Improve the user experience
- Solve a common pain point
- Enhance the platform's capabilities
- Align with the project's goals

## Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Would you be willing to contribute this feature?

- [ ] Yes, I'd be happy to implement this feature
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can help with documentation
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting the idea
